summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SPX Fractal page transformation to DXY-style design. All requested features are successfully implemented and working correctly.
passed_tests: SPX Fractal page loads at /fractal/spx with new DXY-style design
Header strip displays Signal (BULLISH SPX), Confidence (48%), Risk (NORMAL), Phase (Distribution), As of date, and REAL badge
SPX Verdict card with all 5 sections: Market State, Directional Bias, Expected (P50), Range, Position Size
Horizon dropdown with 7D, 14D, 30D, 90D options works correctly
Data updates when horizon selection is changed
What would change this view section displays invalidation conditions
Chart tabs (Synthetic, Replay, Hybrid, Macro ★) are all clickable and functional
Forecast by Horizon table displays with all columns and proper color coding
Risk Context block shows risk metrics (Normal/Medium volatility, -3.0% drawdown, 0.1x position size)
Historical Analogs table displays top matches with 94.6% similarity, 60 years coverage, proper ranking
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Page properly integrates with backend /api/fractal/spx endpoint
SPX price display shows current value (6909.51)
Design matches DXY page visual format and layout

success_percentage.backend: 89% (8/9 endpoints working - minor DXY decision endpoint 404)
